candidates.row_label: Depreciation of intangible and tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: There is no selected COGS reference bucket from the earlier mapping, and the visible depreciation row appears as a separate operating expense line rather than clearly tied to cost of sales/cost of revenues.

variables.notes: No COGS row was previously selected, so no operating D&A row should be added to COGS separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of intangible and tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: The previously selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket contains only 'Other external costs' and 'Personnel costs'. This depreciation row is shown separately at the same operating-expense level, not as a subcomponent of those selected rows, so it should be added separately to avoid omission.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of intangible and tangible fixed assets

variables.notes: Selected the standalone operating D&A line because it sits outside the chosen XSGA component rows and above the financial section.
